name: Nuxt Content
description: Nuxt Content — file-based CMS module for Nuxt.js that reads Markdown, JSON, and YAML files to build documentation sites and content-driven applications.

seo.title: Nuxt Content — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Nuxt Content: Nuxt Content — file-based CMS module for Nuxt.js that reads Markdown, JSON, and YAML files to build documentation sites and content-driven applica

when_to_use: Markdown-based docs site built with Nuxt Content module
Blog powered by Git-stored MDX files in Nuxt application
API reference authored in YAML and rendered via Nuxt Content
Content queried with $content API for dynamic filtered listing
Documentation deployed on Vercel with full-text search

pros: Deep Nuxt integration makes docs a first-class route
File-based content model is familiar to Vue devs
Strong MDC syntax enables interactive Markdown components
Free, open source, and maintained by Nuxt core team
cons: Locked into the Nuxt ecosystem by design
Breaking changes between versions caused pain historically
Complex queries can feel awkward for large content sets
Less polished than standalone docs platforms
review.verdict: The obvious docs choice inside Nuxt apps; don't bring it in just for documentation otherwise.
review.best_for: Teams already on Nuxt who want integrated content and docs alongside their app.
review.not_for: Non-Vue teams or projects where docs are the sole reason to adopt a framework.
